name: Homemade Pickling Spice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the mustard seed, whole allspice, coriander seeds, whole cloves, ground ginger, dried red pepper flakes, and crumbled bay leaf.
2. Mix well to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
3. Store the mixture in an airtight jar or container.
Yield: 1/3 Cup
